Operation 'ocrImage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current summary is adequate but the description is completely empty, which severely impacts AI agent interpretability. The improved description explains: (1) what OCR does in domain context, (2) required inputs (functionId path parameter and image in request body), (3) what the operation returns (text, confidence scores, bounding boxes), and (4) clarifies it's read-only. This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Extract text from image using OCR
data.description_suggestion: Performs optical character recognition (OCR) on an image to extract and recognize text content. Requires a valid function ID and an image provided in the InvokeRequest body. The operation analyzes the image and returns recognized text along with confidence scores and bounding box information for detected text regions. This is a read-only operation with no side effects on stored data.
data.reasoning: The current summary is adequate but the description is completely empty, which severely impacts AI agent interpretability. The improved description explains: (1) what OCR does in domain context, (2) required inputs (functionId path parameter and image in request body), (3) what the operation returns (text, confidence scores, bounding boxes), and (4) clarifies it's read-only. This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect.
